PEEC AI Intelligence Debrief • 2026-04-26-1040 UTC

Bookmo has a clean white-space opportunity: own the AI booking-agent narrative before entrenched live-event software brands do.

Coverage: PEEC Customer API brand report for 2026-03-27 → 2026-04-26; web enrichment via Tavily/Hermes search. Source labels are shown throughout.

Executive read

PEEC API Gigwell leads with 23.4% SOV, 578 mentions, 69.2% visibility and avg position 2.84.

Inferred Bookmo is tracked as the own brand but is absent from AI answers in this 30-day report. That is a risk, but also a low-noise launch window.

Web Competitors are actively publishing comparison and feature-led content that LLMs can cite.

Action queue

1. Publish a “Bookmo vs Gigwell vs Prism for artist booking agencies” comparison page; Gigwell has 23.4% SOV and 578 mentions while Bookmo has 0 mentions. PEEC API + Web
2. Create an AI booking-agent explainer for independent artists and agents, explicitly answering “can AI book a tour?” and mapping workflow to venue/contact discovery. PEEC API + Web
3. Add structured FAQ schema to Bookmo pages for live music booking software, artist booking CRM, and AI booking agent queries to create citation-ready snippets. PEEC API + Web
4. Target Prism’s feature frame with a Bookmo page on automation, offer creation, settlements and communication; Prism has 34.3% visibility but weaker average position 3.82. PEEC API + Web
5. Build a source outreach list from comparison/review publishers and request inclusion; SystemOne and Gigwell are winning alternative/comparison SERP surfaces. PEEC API + inferred
6. Instrument weekly PEEC tracking for Bookmo mention lift from 0 across 169 prompts, with first milestone: visibility count 10 and SOV above 1%. PEEC API + inferred

External evidence drawer

  • Gigwell vs Prism comparison owns competitor narrative
    Gigwell positions itself as stronger on mobile access, automated offer creation and ecosystem workflow versus Prism. • Source: Tavily/Web
  • Prism feature content targets live event management queries
    Prism frames 2025 buyer criteria around planning, real-time analytics, ticketing, financial settlement and team communication. • Source: Tavily/Web
  • Prism claims wide venue adoption
    Prism describes itself as an all-in-one booking system for venues, promoters and agencies used by 2,500+ venues. • Source: Tavily/Web
  • SystemOne alternatives page competes for artist booking searches
    SystemOne uses comparison content around Gigwell alternatives to capture category-intent traffic. • Source: Tavily/Web
  • AI booking systems category expanding beyond music
    Broader AI booking content emphasizes autonomous agents, scheduling conversations and predictive automation. • Source: Tavily/Web

Data coverage

Worked: PEEC Customer API /brands returned 22 brands; /reports/brands returned 22 brand report rows with share of voice, mentions, visibility, sentiment and position fields. Web enrichment returned source URLs/snippets.

Unavailable/limited: PEEC MCP was not used as primary because Customer API provided authenticated production data. Trends are not shown because this run used a single recent 30-day report window.

Quality labels: PEEC API = first-party dashboard data; Tavily/Web = sourced public web result; inferred = recommendation derived from measured gaps.
